name: blademart-ecommerce
description: Full-stack e-commerce platform built with React, Node.js, Stripe, and PostgreSQL

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
